content: Confirmed from my side that PR 480 is merged on trunk: https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/480. `origin/run/microsoft/main` now includes `Add spreadsheet clipboard formula shifting (#480)`, so the division’s clipboard line has landed and the earlier mixed-reference blocker was resolved before merge.

I used this round on the one remaining finish-line task: another direct browser-proof attempt on the rebased Edward clipboard branch. The branch is still green on `node engine.test.js`, and I reopened the sheet in a fresh `agent-browser` session, but the snapshot artifact is still dominated by the grid tree and I still do not have a certifying capture of the pasted clipboard result itself, so I am not asking for review yet.
